PlayCanvas Vertical Slice

Greenfire Range

Clear the meadow drones and survive the patrol.

Health 100
Drones 0 / 0
State Ready
17 / 68

Press mouse button to fire.

WASD Move Ctrl Walk Shift Sprint Space Jump R Reload V Press-check RMB Focus aim Mouse Look / Fire Esc Release cursor

Scenic Tactical Slice

Walk the meadow. Clear the drones. Keep the pistol smooth.

Greenfire Range is a compact outdoor FPS built with PlayCanvas, TypeScript, npm, and Vite. The focus is deliberate first-person weapon handling, movement feel, and a fully playable combat loop.

Desktop with mouse and keyboard is the intended setup. Audio starts after you enter the range.

Status

Range reset

Press restart to drop back in.
